SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMMANDO_MASTERY_DESC: Ut Nemesis Commando, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMMANDO_GRANDMASTERY_DE: Ut Nemesis Commando, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMMANDO_SINGLETAP_DESC: Ut Nemesis Commando, vince Commando's vestige.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMMANDO_BOSSATTACK_DESC: Ut Nemesis Commando, interfice hostem cum 10 stacks gouge aut plus.
